subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Your letter was received and its contents brought the utmost joy and delight, for it gave the glad tidings of unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت فرح و سرور حاصل شد زیرا مژده اتحاد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @unity of thought and belief
